name: performance-engineer
description: Expert performance engineer specializing in modern observability,
capabilities: Configure OpenTelemetry for distributed tracing and metrics collection across microservices
Analyze CPU, memory, and I/O profiling data to identify performance bottlenecks
Design and execute load tests using k6, JMeter, or Gatling with realistic traffic patterns
Implement multi-tier caching strategies with Redis, CDN, and application-level caches
Optimize frontend performance for Core Web Vitals including LCP, FID, and CLS
Set up performance monitoring dashboards with Prometheus, Grafana, and SLI/SLO tracking
author: sickn33
securitySummary: Static analysis flagged 4 patterns that were all determined to be false positives. The skill is a text-based AI prompt for performance engineering guidance with no executable code, network calls, or command execution capabilities. All flagged patterns were matches on unrelated text (frontmatter description, load testing references). The skill includes responsible safety guidelines for production load testing.
valueStatement: Slow applications lose users and revenue. This skill provides expert guidance on profiling, monitoring, and optimizing performance across your entire stack.
limitations: Cannot directly access your production metrics or tracing systems without proper integration
Load testing recommendations require manual implementation and approval before production use
Performance improvements depend on your infrastructure access and deployment capabilities
Cannot automatically modify application code or configuration without explicit permission

useCases.targetUser: Engineering managers responsible for customer experience and conversion rates
useCases.title: E-commerce Platform Optimization
useCases.description: Improve page load times and checkout performance for high-traffic online store during peak seasons.

useCases.targetUser: DevOps engineers managing cloud-native applications and Kubernetes deployments
useCases.title: Microservices Observability Setup
useCases.description: Implement comprehensive distributed tracing and monitoring across a containerized microservices architecture.

useCases.targetUser: Backend developers building scalable APIs with strict performance requirements
useCases.title: API Performance Tuning
useCases.description: Reduce latency and increase throughput for REST and GraphQL APIs serving mobile and web clients.

promptTemplates.title: Quick Performance Audit
promptTemplates.prompt: Review my application architecture and identify the top 3 performance bottlenecks. Current stack: [describe your tech stack]. Main user complaints: [describe issues]. Priority: [speed/cost/reliability].
promptTemplates.scenario: Initial performance assessment for applications without existing monitoring

promptTemplates.title: Load Testing Plan
promptTemplates.prompt: Create a load testing strategy for [service name] that handles [requests per second] with [concurrent users]. Include success criteria, test scenarios, and tools recommendation. Current infrastructure: [describe setup].
promptTemplates.scenario: Planning performance validation before major product launch or traffic increase

promptTemplates.title: Observability Implementation
promptTemplates.prompt: Design an observability stack for our [microservices/monolith] using [preferred tools if any]. We need to track [specific metrics] and alert on [conditions]. Team size: [number]. Cloud provider: [AWS/GCP/Azure].
promptTemplates.scenario: Setting up comprehensive monitoring and tracing for production systems

promptTemplates.title: Production Incident Analysis
promptTemplates.prompt: Analyze this performance incident: [describe symptoms, timeline, affected services]. Available data: [logs, metrics, traces]. Help identify root cause and recommend immediate fixes plus long-term prevention.
promptTemplates.scenario: Responding to active performance degradation or outage in production

bestPractices: Always establish performance baselines before making changes to measure actual impact
Focus optimization efforts on user-facing metrics that directly affect experience and business goals
Implement performance budgets in CI/CD pipelines to catch regressions before production deployment
antiPatterns: Optimizing without measurement leads to wasted effort on non-bottlenecks
Load testing production without approval and safeguards risks service outages
Adding caching without invalidation strategy causes stale data and consistency issues

faq.question: What access do I need to provide for performance analysis?
faq.answer: Share architecture diagrams, current metrics dashboards, and profiling data if available. Direct system access is not required for initial recommendations.

faq.question: Can this skill run load tests automatically?
faq.answer: No. The skill provides load testing strategies, scripts, and configurations that you must review and execute in your approved environments.

faq.question: How do I measure if performance improvements are working?
faq.answer: Establish baseline metrics before changes, implement continuous monitoring, and compare against predefined success criteria like response time percentiles and error rates.

faq.question: Is this skill suitable for mobile app performance optimization?
faq.answer: Yes. Guidance covers mobile-specific concerns including battery usage, network optimization, offline-first strategies, and React Native or Flutter performance.

faq.question: What if my application uses technologies not mentioned in the capabilities?
faq.answer: Core performance principles apply across technologies. Provide your tech stack details for tailored recommendations using generalizable optimization patterns.

faq.question: Can this help with cloud cost optimization related to performance?
faq.answer: Yes. Performance improvements often reduce resource requirements. The skill covers right-sizing, auto-scaling optimization, and cost-performance tradeoff analysis.
